Name: Label
Description: A display label for the DevelopmentActivityScheme.

Name: DevelopmentActivitySchemeReference
Description: Reference to an existing DevelopmentActivityScheme for inclusion.

Name: DevelopmentActivityReference
Description: Extensible structure for development activity elements used in describing the development of a questionnaire.: ContentReviewActivity, TranslationActivity, and PretestActivity.

Name: DevelopmentActivityGroupReference
Description: A description of a group of DevelopmentActivity for administrative or conceptual purposes.
